subject: fix(summary): merge stat-card dead-wrapper into the styled tile div
body:
Post-migration audit finding. The Key Stats grid in Summary.jsx had a two-div sandwich per tile:
{metrics.features}
Features Built
The outer `stat-card` class had no CSS rule defined anywhere in the dashboard — it was a dead marker class that survived a prior cleanup. The interaction (role, tabIndex, aria-label, onClick, onKeyDown) was on the outer, and the visual (padding, background, rounding, text alignment) was on the inner. Functionally fine but a dead class is exactly the kind of "leave unused variables" trap CLAUDE.md's Cleanup rules forbid. Merged into a single
per tile carrying both the interaction and the visual classes:
{metrics.features}
Features Built
Added a rationale comment block at the top of the Key Stats section documenting why DaisyUI's `stat` component was rejected (horizontal stat-block vs our denser 1x4 / 2x2 tile grid) so future audits don't re-open the question. Affects all four tiles (Features Built, Bugs Fixed, Avg Urgency, % Planned). No behavior change — same click handlers, same aria labels, same visuals; just one less DOM element per tile and one less dead class in the codebase. Tags: ui, refactor, cleanup, accessibility, audit Complexity: 1 Urgency: 2 Impact: internal Risk: low Debt: paid Epic: daisyui-component-migration Semver: patch
title: merge stat-card dead-wrapper into the styled tile div
